subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-15 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: While I was in Europe, on a certain occasion, I made mention that whatsoever all souls hold as their highest hopes and aspirations, yet their hands fail to attain thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اروپا بمناسبتی ذکر می کردم که آنچه را جمیع ناس نهایت آمال و آرزویشان است و دستشان بآن نمی رسد
subcodes.subjects: @the animal kingdom, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
